        </div><yt-playability-error-supported-renderers id="error-screen" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" disable-upgrade="" hidden>

        </yt-playability-error-supported-renderers>

       </div>

       <div id="below" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

        <div id="shopping-timely-shelf" class="attached-message style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"></div>

        <div id="alerts" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"></div>

        <div id="messages" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"></div>

        <div id="clarify-box" class="attached-message style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"></div>

        <div id="limited-state" class="attached-message style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"></div><ytd-watch-metadata is-watch-flexy="" class="watch-active-metadata style-scope ytd-watch-flexy style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" description-collapsed="" video-id="" title-headline-xs="" action-buttons-update-owner-width="" style="--yt-saturated-base-background: initial; --yt-saturated-raised-background: initial; --yt-saturated-additive-background: initial; --yt-saturated-text-primary: initial; --yt-saturated-text-secondary: initial; --yt-saturated-outline: initial; --yt-saturated-key-light: initial; --yt-saturated-collection-stack: initial; --yt-saturated-inverted-background: initial; --yt-saturated-text-primary-inverse: initial; --yt-saturated-text-disabled: initial; --yt-saturated-drop-shadow: initial; --yt-saturated-card-outline: initial; --yt-saturated-overlay-background: initial; --yt-saturated-overlay-text-primary: initial;">

         <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-watch-metadata--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

         <div id="above-the-fold" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata">

          <div id="title" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata"><ytd-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata" system-icons="" hidden>

            <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-badge-supported-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

            <dom-repeat id="repeat" as="badge" class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer">

             <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

            </dom-repeat>

            <yt-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer"></yt-badge-supported-renderer>

           </ytd-badge-supported-renderer>

           <h1 class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata"><yt-formatted-string force-default-style="" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata" is-empty="">

             <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

             <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

            </yt-formatted-string></h1><ytd-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata" system-icons="" hidden>

            <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-badge-supported-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

            <dom-repeat id="repeat" as="badge" class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer">

             <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

            </dom-repeat>

            <yt-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer"></yt-badge-supported-renderer>

           </ytd-badge-supported-renderer>

          </div>

          <div id="top-row" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata">

           <div id="owner" class="item style-scope ytd-watch-metadata"><ytd-video-owner-renderer watch-metadata-refresh="" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata">

             <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-video-owner-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

             <a class="yt-simple-endpoint style-scope ytd-video-owner-renderer" tabindex="-1">

              <ps-dom-if class="style-scope ytd-video-owner-renderer">

               <template is="dom-if"></template>

              </ps-dom-if>

              <div id="avatar-stack" class="style-scope ytd-video-owner-renderer"></div></a>

             <div id="upload-info" class="style-scope ytd-video-owner-renderer">

              <yt-attributed-string id="attributed-channel-name" ellipsis-truncate="true" no-pre-wrap="true" no-wrap="true" class="style-scope ytd-video-owner-renderer"></yt-attributed-string><ytd-channel-name id="channel-name" class="style-scope ytd-video-owner-renderer">

               <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-channel-name--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

               <div id="container" class="style-scope ytd-channel-name">

                <div id="text-container" class="style-scope ytd-channel-name"><yt-formatted-string id="text" link-inherit-color="" respect-lang-dir="" title="" class="style-scope ytd-channel-name" is-empty="" ellipsis-truncate="" ellipsis-truncate-styling="" dir="auto" style="text-align: left;">

                  <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

                  <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

                 </yt-formatted-string>

                </div><tp-yt-paper-tooltip aria-hidden="true" fit-to-visible-bounds="" class="style-scope ytd-channel-name" role="tooltip" tabindex="-1" aria-label="tooltip">

                 <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:tp-yt-paper-tooltip--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,third_party.javascript.youtube_components.tp_yt_paper_tooltip.tp.yt.paper.tooltip.css.js-->

                 <div id="tooltip" class="hidden style-scope tp-yt-paper-tooltip" style-target="tooltip">

                 </div>

                </tp-yt-paper-tooltip>

               </div>

               <ytd-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-channel-name" system-icons="" hidden>

                <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-badge-supported-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

                <dom-repeat id="repeat" as="badge" class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer">

                 <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

                </dom-repeat>

                <yt-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer"></yt-badge-supported-renderer>

               </ytd-badge-supported-renderer>

              </ytd-channel-name><yt-formatted-string id="owner-sub-count" class="style-scope ytd-video-owner-renderer" is-empty="">

               <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

               <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

              </yt-formatted-string>

             </div>

             <div id="purchase-button" class="style-scope ytd-video-owner-renderer"></div>

             <div id="sponsor-button" class="style-scope ytd-video-owner-renderer"></div>

             <div id="analytics-button" class="style-scope ytd-video-owner-renderer"></div>

            </ytd-video-owner-renderer>

            <div id="subscribe-button" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata"></div>

           </div>

           <div id="actions" class="item style-scope ytd-watch-metadata">

            <div id="actions-inner" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata">

             <div id="menu" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata"></div>

            </div>

           </div>

          </div>

          <div id="middle-row" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata"></div>

          <div id="bottom-row" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata"><dom-if id="description-wrapper" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata">

            <template is="dom-if"></template>

           </dom-if>

           <div id="bottom-actions" class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata"></div>

           <div id="comment-teaser" class="item style-scope ytd-watch-metadata" hidden></div>

           <div id="teaser-carousel" class="item style-scope ytd-watch-metadata" hidden></div>

          </div>

         </div>

         <ytd-metadata-row-container-renderer class="style-scope ytd-watch-metadata">

          <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-metadata-row-container-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

          <div id="always-shown" class="style-scope ytd-metadata-row-container-renderer"></div>

          <div id="collapsible" class="style-scope ytd-metadata-row-container-renderer"></div>

         </ytd-metadata-row-container-renderer>

        </ytd-watch-metadata>

        <div class=" style-scope ytd-watch-flexy style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" hidden>

         <div id="info" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

          <div id="info-skeleton" class="watch-skeleton style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

           <div id="primary-info" class="skeleton-light-border-bottom">

            <div id="title" class="text-shell skeleton-bg-color"></div>

            <div id="info">

             <div id="count" class="text-shell skeleton-bg-color"></div>

             <div class="flex-1"></div>

             <div id="menu">

              <div class="menu-button skeleton-bg-color"></div>

              <div class="menu-button skeleton-bg-color"></div>

              <div class="menu-button skeleton-bg-color"></div>

              <div class="menu-button skeleton-bg-color"></div>

              <div class="menu-button skeleton-bg-color"></div>

             </div>

            </div>

           </div>

          </div>

          <div id="info-contents" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" hidden>

           <ytd-video-primary-info-renderer class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

            <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-video-primary-info-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

            <div id="container" class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer">

             <ytd-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer" system-icons="" hidden>

              <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-badge-supported-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

              <dom-repeat id="repeat" as="badge" class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer">

               <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

              </dom-repeat>

              <yt-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer"></yt-badge-supported-renderer>

             </ytd-badge-supported-renderer><a class="yt-simple-endpoint style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer" hidden>

              <yt-icon class="super-title-icon style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer" icon="yt-icons:location_pin">

               <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-icon--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.core.yt_icon.yt.icon.css.js-->

               <span class="yt-icon-shape style-scope yt-icon ytSpecIconShapeHost">

                <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

                 <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                  <path d="M12 1a9 9 0 00-9 9c0 6.354 5.679 11.037 8.015 12.694a1.69 1.69 0 001.97 0C15.321 21.037 21 16.355 21 10a9 9 0 00-9-9Zm0 2a7 7 0 017 7c0 2.567-1.15 4.9-2.702 6.871-1.47 1.865-3.199 3.273-4.298 4.07-1.098-.797-2.828-2.205-4.298-4.07C6.149 14.9 5 12.567 5 10a7 7 0 017-7Zm0 3a4 4 0 100 8 4 4 0 000-8Zm0 2a2 2 0 110 4 2 2 0 010-4Z"></path>

                 </svg>

                </div></span>

              </yt-icon></a><yt-formatted-string class="super-title style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer" force-default-style="" is-empty="">

              <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

              <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

             </yt-formatted-string>

             <h1 class="title style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer">

              <yt-formatted-string force-default-style="" class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer" is-empty="">

               <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

               <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

              </yt-formatted-string></h1><ytd-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer" system-icons="" hidden>

              <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-badge-supported-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

              <dom-repeat id="repeat" as="badge" class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer">

               <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

              </dom-repeat>

              <yt-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer"></yt-badge-supported-renderer>

             </ytd-badge-supported-renderer>

             <div id="info" class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer">

              <div id="info-text" class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer">

               <div id="count" class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer" hidden></div>

               <div id="info-strings" class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer" hidden>

                <span id="dot" class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer" hidden></span><ps-dom-repeat class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer">

                 <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

                </ps-dom-repeat>

               </div>

              </div>

              <div id="flex" class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer"></div>

              <div id="menu-container" class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer">

               <div id="menu" class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer"></div><ytd-sentiment-bar-renderer id="sentiment" class="style-scope ytd-video-primary-info-renderer" system-icons="" hidden>

                <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-sentiment-bar-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

                <div id="container" class="style-scope ytd-sentiment-bar-renderer">

                 <div id="like-bar" class="style-scope ytd-sentiment-bar-renderer"></div>

                </div>

                <tp-yt-paper-tooltip position="top" class="style-scope ytd-sentiment-bar-renderer" role="tooltip" tabindex="-1" aria-label="tooltip">

                 <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:tp-yt-paper-tooltip--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,third_party.javascript.youtube_components.tp_yt_paper_tooltip.tp.yt.paper.tooltip.css.js-->

                 <div id="tooltip" class="hidden style-scope tp-yt-paper-tooltip" style-target="tooltip">

                 </div>

                </tp-yt-paper-tooltip>

               </ytd-sentiment-bar-renderer>

              </div>

             </div>

            </div>

           </ytd-video-primary-info-renderer>

          </div>

         </div>

         <div id="meta" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

          <div id="meta-skeleton" class="watch-skeleton style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

           <div id="secondary-info" class="skeleton-light-border-bottom">

            <div id="top-row">

             <div id="video-owner" class="flex-1">

              <div id="channel-icon" class="skeleton-bg-color"></div>

              <div id="upload-info" class="flex-1">

               <div id="owner-name" class="text-shell skeleton-bg-color"></div>

               <div id="published-date" class="text-shell skeleton-bg-color"></div>

              </div>

             </div>

             <div id="subscribe-button" class="skeleton-bg-color"></div>

            </div>

           </div>

          </div>

          <div id="meta-contents" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" hidden></div>

         </div>

        </div>

        <div id="expandable-metadata" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"></div>

        <div id="ticket-shelf" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"></div><dom-if restamp="" id="merch-shelf" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

         <template is="dom-if"></template>

        </dom-if> <ytd-comments id="comments" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" disable-upgrade="" hidden>

        </ytd-comments>

       </div>

      </div>

     </ytd-watch-flexy>

    </ytd-page-manager>

   </div>

   <div id="secondary" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

    <div id="secondary-split-scroll-spacer" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" hidden></div>

    <div id="secondary-inner" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

     <div id="panels" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

     </div><ytd-playlist-panel-renderer id="playlist" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" hidden collapsible="" is-dark-theme="">

      <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-playlist-panel-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

      <div id="container" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

       <div class="header style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

        <div id="header-contents" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

         <div id="header-top-row" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

          <div id="header-description" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

           <h3 class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

            <yt-formatted-string class="title style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer" ellipsis-truncate="" link-inherit-color="" is-empty="" ellipsis-truncate-styling="" title="">

             <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

             <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

            </yt-formatted-string></h3>

           <h3 id="next-video-title" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer" hidden><span id="next-label" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer"></span><yt-formatted-string ellipsis-truncate="" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer" is-empty="" ellipsis-truncate-styling="" title="">

             <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

             <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

            </yt-formatted-string></h3>

           <div id="publisher-container" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

            <yt-formatted-string class="byline-title style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer" ellipsis-truncate="" hidden is-empty="" ellipsis-truncate-styling="" title="">

             <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

             <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

            </yt-formatted-string><ytd-badge-supported-renderer class="badge style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer" system-icons="" hidden>

             <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-badge-supported-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

             <dom-repeat id="repeat" as="badge" class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer">

              <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

             </dom-repeat>

             <yt-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer"></yt-badge-supported-renderer>

            </ytd-badge-supported-renderer><yt-formatted-string class="publisher style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer" ellipsis-truncate="" link-inherit-color="" is-empty="" ellipsis-truncate-styling="" title="">

             <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

             <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

            </yt-formatted-string>

            <div class="index-message-wrapper style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

             <span class="index-message style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">NaN / NaN</span><yt-formatted-string class="index-message style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer" respecthtmldir="" hidden is-empty="">

              <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

              <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

             </yt-formatted-string>

            </div>

           </div>

          </div>

          <div id="end-actions-in-header" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

           <div id="overflow-menu-top-row" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer"></div>

          </div>

          <div id="top-row-buttons" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer"></div><yt-icon-button id="trailing-button" toggleable="" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

           <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-icon-button--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_icon_button.yt.icon.button.css.js-->

           <button id="button" class="style-scope yt-icon-button" aria-label="Contraer">

            <yt-icon id="trailing-icon" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

             <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-icon--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.core.yt_icon.yt.icon.css.js-->

             <span class="yt-icon-shape style-scope yt-icon ytSpecIconShapeHost">

              <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

               <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                <path d="M17.293 5.293 12 10.586 6.707 5.293a1 1 0 10-1.414 1.414L10.586 12l-5.293 5.293a1 1 0 001.414 1.414L12 13.414l5.293 5.293a1 1 0 001.414-1.414L13.414 12l5.293-5.293a1 1 0 10-1.414-1.414Z"></path>

               </svg>

              </div></span>

            </yt-icon></button>

           <yt-interaction id="interaction" class="circular style-scope yt-icon-button">

            <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-interaction--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_interaction.yt.interaction.css.js-->

            <div class="stroke style-scope yt-interaction"></div>

            <div class="fill style-scope yt-interaction"></div>

           </yt-interaction>

          </yt-icon-button>

         </div>

         <div id="playlist-actions" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

          <div id="start-actions" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

           <div id="playlist-action-menu" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer"></div>

           <div id="save-button" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer"></div>

          </div>

          <div id="end-actions" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer">

           <div id="overflow-menu" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer"></div>

          </div>

         </div>

        </div>

       </div>

       <div id="content-header" class="style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer" hidden></div>

       <div id="items" class="playlist-items style-scope ytd-playlist-panel-renderer"></div>

      </div>

     </ytd-playlist-panel-renderer>

     <div id="chat-container" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"><dom-if restamp="" id="chat-template" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

       <template is="dom-if"></template>

      </dom-if>

     </div>

     <div id="persistent-panel-container" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"></div>

     <div id="donation-shelf" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"></div>

     <div id="related" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy">

      <div id="player-ads" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"></div><ytd-watch-next-secondary-results-renderer class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" is-watch-related-chips-top-aligned="" lockup-container-type="3" secondary-grid-columns="2" is-two-columns="" style="--yt-img-shadow-placeholder-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); --yt-img-shadow-min-height: 100%; --yt-img-shadow-min-width: 100%;">

       <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-watch-next-secondary-results-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

       <div id="offer-module" class="style-scope ytd-watch-next-secondary-results-renderer"></div>

       <div id="items" class="style-scope ytd-watch-next-secondary-results-renderer"></div>

       <div id="continuations" class="style-scope ytd-watch-next-secondary-results-renderer"></div>

      </ytd-watch-next-secondary-results-renderer>

      <div id="related-skeleton" class="watch-skeleton style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" hidden>

       <div id="related">

        <div class="autoplay skeleton-light-border-bottom">

         <div id="upnext" class="skeleton-bg-color"></div>

         <div class="video-skeleton">

          <div class="video-details">

           <div class="thumbnail skeleton-bg-color"></div>

           <div class="details flex-1">

            <div class="video-title text-shell skeleton-bg-color"></div>

            <div class="video-meta text-shell skeleton-bg-color"></div>

           </div>

          </div>

         </div>

        </div>

        <div class="video-skeleton">

         <div class="video-details">

          <div class="thumbnail skeleton-bg-color"></div>

          <div class="details flex-1">

           <div class="video-title text-shell skeleton-bg-color"></div>

           <div class="video-meta text-shell skeleton-bg-color"></div>

          </div>

         </div>

        </div>

        <div class="video-skeleton">

         <div class="video-details">

          <div class="thumbnail skeleton-bg-color"></div>

   <div id="fixed-side-menu" class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" hidden></div>

   <ytd-search class="style-scope ytd-page-manager" has-bigger-thumbs="" reset-stacking-context="" page-subtype="search" mini-guide-visible="" role="main" has-search-header="">

    <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-search--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

    <div id="container" class="style-scope ytd-search">

     <div id="header" class="style-scope ytd-search">

      <ytd-search-header-renderer class="style-scope ytd-search" has-chip-bar="">

       <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-search-header-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

       <div id="back-button" class="style-scope ytd-search-header-renderer"></div>

       <div id="chip-bar" class="style-scope ytd-search-header-renderer">

        <yt-chip-cloud-renderer class="style-scope ytd-search-header-renderer" at-start="" id="" is-dark-theme="" at-end="">

         <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-chip-cloud-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.renderers.sections.yt_chip_cloud_renderer.yt.chip.cloud.renderer.css.js-->

         <div id="container" class="style-scope yt-chip-cloud-renderer">

          <div id="left-arrow" class="style-scope yt-chip-cloud-renderer">

           <div id="left-arrow-button" class="style-scope yt-chip-cloud-renderer">

            <ytd-button-renderer class="style-scope yt-chip-cloud-renderer" button-renderer="" button-next="">

             <!--css-build:shady-->

             <yt-button-shape>

              <button class="yt-spec-button-shape-next yt-spec-button-shape-next--text yt-spec-button-shape-next--mono yt-spec-button-shape-next--size-m yt-spec-button-shape-next--icon-only-default yt-spec-button-shape-next--enable-backdrop-filter-experiment" title="" aria-label="Anterior" aria-disabled="false">

               <div aria-hidden="true" class="yt-spec-button-shape-next__icon">

                <span class="ytIconWrapperHost" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;"><span class="yt-icon-shape ytSpecIconShapeHost">

                  <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

                   <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                    <path d="M13.793 5.293 7.086 12l6.707 6.707a1 1 0 101.414-1.414L9.914 12l5.293-5.293a1 1 0 10-1.414-1.414Z"></path>

                   </svg>

                  </div></span></span>

               </div>

               <yt-touch-feedback-shape aria-hidden="true" class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeHost ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeTouchResponse">

                <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeStroke"></div>

                <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeFill"></div>

               </yt-touch-feedback-shape></button>

             </yt-button-shape>

             <tp-yt-paper-tooltip offset="8" disable-upgrade=""></tp-yt-paper-tooltip>

            </ytd-button-renderer>

           </div>

          </div>

          <div id="scroll-container" class="style-scope yt-chip-cloud-renderer" style="touch-action: pan-y;"><iron-selector id="chips" activate-event="" role="tablist" selected-attribute="selected" class="style-scope yt-chip-cloud-renderer" style="transform: translateX(0px);">

            <yt-chip-cloud-chip-renderer class="style-scope yt-chip-cloud-renderer iron-selected" chip-style="STYLE_HOME_FILTER" selected>

             <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-chip-cloud-chip-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.renderers.sections.yt_chip_cloud_chip_renderer.yt.chip.cloud.chip.renderer.css.js-->

             <div id="chip-shape-container" class="style-scope yt-chip-cloud-chip-renderer"><chip-shape class="ytChipShapeHost">

               <button class="ytChipShapeButtonReset" role="tab" aria-selected="true">

                <div class="ytChipShapeChip ytChipShapeActive ytChipShapeOnlyTextPadding">

                 <div>

                  Todo

                 </div><yt-touch-feedback-shape aria-hidden="true" class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeHost ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeTouchResponse">

                  <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeStroke" style="border-radius: 8px;"></div>

                  <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeFill" style="border-radius: 8px;"></div>

                 </yt-touch-feedback-shape>

                </div></button>

              </chip-shape>

             </div>

            </yt-chip-cloud-chip-renderer>

            <yt-chip-cloud-chip-renderer class="style-scope yt-chip-cloud-renderer" chip-style="STYLE_HOME_FILTER">

          <div id="right-arrow" class="style-scope yt-chip-cloud-renderer">

            <ytd-button-renderer class="style-scope yt-chip-cloud-renderer" button-renderer="" button-next="">

             <!--css-build:shady-->

              <button class="yt-spec-button-shape-next yt-spec-button-shape-next--text yt-spec-button-shape-next--mono yt-spec-button-shape-next--size-m yt-spec-button-shape-next--icon-only-default yt-spec-button-shape-next--enable-backdrop-filter-experiment" title="" aria-label="Siguiente" aria-disabled="false">

               <div aria-hidden="true" class="yt-spec-button-shape-next__icon">

                <span class="ytIconWrapperHost" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;"><span class="yt-icon-shape ytSpecIconShapeHost">

                  <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

                   <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                    <path d="M8.793 5.293a1 1 0 000 1.414L14.086 12l-5.293 5.293a1 1 0 101.414 1.414L16.914 12l-6.707-6.707a1 1 0 00-1.414 0Z"></path>

                   </svg>

                  </div></span></span>

               </div>

               <yt-touch-feedback-shape aria-hidden="true" class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeHost ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeTouchResponse">

                <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeStroke"></div>

          </div>

        </yt-chip-cloud-renderer>

       </div>

       <div id="about-these-results" class="style-scope ytd-search-header-renderer"></div>

       <div id="filter-button" class="style-scope ytd-search-header-renderer">

        <ytd-button-renderer class="style-scope ytd-search-header-renderer" button-renderer="" button-next="">

         <!--css-build:shady-->

         <yt-button-shape>

          <button class="yt-spec-button-shape-next yt-spec-button-shape-next--text yt-spec-button-shape-next--mono yt-spec-button-shape-next--size-m yt-spec-button-shape-next--icon-trailing yt-spec-button-shape-next--enable-backdrop-filter-experiment" title="" aria-label="Filtros de búsqueda" aria-disabled="false">

           <div class="yt-spec-button-shape-next__button-text-content">

            <span class="ytAttributedStringHost ytAttributedStringWhiteSpaceNoWrap" role="text" style="">Filtros</span>

           </div>

           <div class="yt-spec-button-shape-next__icon">

            <span class="ytIconWrapperHost" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;"><span class="yt-icon-shape ytSpecIconShapeHost">

              <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

               <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                <path d="M9 3a4 4 0 00-3.874 3H3a1 1 0 000 2h2.126a4.002 4.002 0 007.748 0H21a1 1 0 100-2h-8.126A4 4 0 009 3Zm0 2a2 2 0 110 4 2 2 0 010-4Zm6 8a4 4 0 00-3.874 3H3a1 1 0 000 2h8.126a4.002 4.002 0 007.748 0H21a1 1 0 000-2h-2.126A4 4 0 0015 13Zm0 2a2 2 0 110 4 2 2 0 010-4Z"></path>

               </svg>

              </div></span></span>

           </div>

           <yt-touch-feedback-shape aria-hidden="true" class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeHost ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeTouchResponse">

            <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeStroke"></div>

            <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeFill"></div>

           </yt-touch-feedback-shape></button>

         </yt-button-shape>

         <tp-yt-paper-tooltip offset="8" role="tooltip" tabindex="-1" aria-label="tooltip">

          <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:tp-yt-paper-tooltip--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,third_party.javascript.youtube_components.tp_yt_paper_tooltip.tp.yt.paper.tooltip.css.js-->

          <div id="tooltip" class="hidden style-scope tp-yt-paper-tooltip" style-target="tooltip">

           Filtros de búsqueda

          </div>

         </tp-yt-paper-tooltip>

        </ytd-button-renderer>

       </div>

      </ytd-search-header-renderer>

     </div><ytd-two-column-search-results-renderer is-search="true" class="style-scope ytd-search" use-bigger-thumbs="" bigger-thumbs-style="BIG" page-subtype="search" mini-guide-visible="">

      <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-two-column-search-results-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

      <div id="primary" class="style-scope ytd-two-column-search-results-renderer"><ytd-section-list-renderer class="style-scope ytd-two-column-search-results-renderer" page-subtype="search" hide-bottom-separator="">

        <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-section-list-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

        <div id="header-container" class="style-scope ytd-section-list-renderer">

         <div id="header" class="style-scope ytd-section-list-renderer"></div>

         <div id="sub-menu" class="style-scope ytd-section-list-renderer">

          <ytd-search-sub-menu-renderer class="style-scope ytd-section-list-renderer">

           <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-search-sub-menu-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

           <div id="filter-menu" class="style-scope ytd-search-sub-menu-renderer">

            <div id="container" class="style-scope ytd-search-sub-menu-renderer"><ytd-toggle-button-renderer align-by-text="" class="style-scope ytd-search-sub-menu-renderer" button-renderer="true">

              <!--css-build:shady-->

              <yt-button-shape>

              </yt-button-shape>

              <tp-yt-paper-tooltip fit-to-visible-bounds="" offset="8" disable-upgrade="">

              </tp-yt-paper-tooltip>

             </ytd-toggle-button-renderer> <ps-dom-if class="style-scope ytd-search-sub-menu-renderer">

              <template is="dom-if"></template>

             </ps-dom-if>

            </div><ps-dom-if class="style-scope ytd-search-sub-menu-renderer">

             <template is="dom-if"></template>

            </ps-dom-if>

           </div>

          </ytd-search-sub-menu-renderer>

         </div>

        </div>

        <div id="contents" class="style-scope ytd-section-list-renderer">

         <ytd-item-section-renderer class="style-scope ytd-section-list-renderer" first-lockup-no-top-margin="" lockup-container-type="3" not-sticky="" exp-fix-playlist-header="" enable-related-chips-caching="" secondary-grid-columns="2" use-height-hack="" top-spacing-zero="" page-subtype="search" header-style="">

          <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-item-section-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

          <div id="header" class=" style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer"></div>

          <div id="spinner-container" class="style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer"><tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite class="style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer" aria-hidden="true" aria-label="loading">

            <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,third_party.javascript.youtube_components.tp_yt_paper_spinner_lite.tp.yt.paper.spinner.lite.css.js-->

            <div id="spinnerContainer" class="  style-scope tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite">

             <div class="spinner-layer style-scope tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite">

                        <div class="ytwFeedAdMetadataViewModelHostAvatarStyleCompact">

                         <ad-avatar-view-model class="ytwAdAvatarViewModelHostIsClickableAdComponent">

                          <yt-avatar-shape>

                           <div class="yt-spec-avatar-shape yt-spec-avatar-shape__button yt-spec-avatar-shape__button--button-extra-small yt-spec-avatar-shape__button--tappable" aria-label="ClickUp" role="button" tabindex="0">

                  <yt-icon class="style-scope ytd-thumbnail-overlay-time-status-renderer" disable-upgrade="" hidden></yt-icon><span id="text" class="style-scope ytd-thumbnail-overlay-time-status-renderer" aria-label="17 minutos y 55 segundos"> 17:55 </span>

              <div class="metadata-snippet-container-one-line style-scope ytd-video-renderer style-scope ytd-video-renderer"><a class="yt-simple-endpoint metadata-snippet-timestamp style-scope ytd-video-renderer" hidden> <span id="time" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer"></span>

                <yt-formatted-string class="metadata-snippet-text-navigation style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

                 <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> es el tercer lenguaje más usado en el mundo del desarrollo de software según el índice TIOBE (solo detrás de Python y C) y ...</span>

                </yt-formatted-string> </a> <yt-formatted-string class="metadata-snippet-text style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

                <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> es el tercer lenguaje más usado en el mundo del desarrollo de software según el índice TIOBE (solo detrás de Python y C) y ...</span>

                <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

                <div id="header" skip-key-interaction="" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-img-shadow--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_img_shadow.yt.img.shadow.css.js-->

                    <img id="img" draggable="false" class="style-scope yt-img-shadow" alt="" src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/E8weQyNVWug/hqdefault_26033.jpg?sqp=-oaymwEnCNACELwBSFryq4qpAxkIARUAAIhCGAHYAQHiAQoIGBACGAY4AUAB&rs=AOn4CLBkZhZHrcK_9R9ucK6K5PNd170i3g">

                   </yt-img-shadow>

                  <div id="prominent-collapsed-label" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-icon class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" disable-upgrade="" hidden>

                   </yt-icon> <yt-formatted-string id="prominent-label-text" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">5</span>

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> capítulos</span>

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div>

                  <div id="timestamp" raised="" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" is-empty="">

                    <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

                    <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div>

                  <div id="collapsed-title" role="button" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    Introducción | Características de JAVA | Historia de JAVA | ¿JAVA es Open Source o Propietario? | Ediciones de JAVA

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div>

                  <div id="expanded-title-subtitle-group" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden><yt-icon id="expanded-title-icon" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" disable-upgrade="" hidden>

                   </yt-icon>

                   <div id="expanded-title-subtitle-text" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    <div id="expanded-title" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                      <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">Este video tiene </span>

                      <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">5</span>

                      <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> capítulos</span>

                     </yt-formatted-string>

                    </div>

                    <div id="expanded-subtitle" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden><a class="yt-simple-endpoint style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                       <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-icon--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.core.yt_icon.yt.icon.css.js-->

                       <span class="yt-icon-shape style-scope yt-icon ytSpecIconShapeHost">

                        <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

                         <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                          <path d="M8.793 5.293a1 1 0 000 1.414L14.086 12l-5.293 5.293a1 1 0 101.414 1.414L16.914 12l-6.707-6.707a1 1 0 00-1.414 0Z"></path>

                         </svg>

                        </div></span>

                      </yt-icon>

                     </div>

                     <div id="right-arrow-button" class="style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer">

                      <ytd-button-renderer class="style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer" button-renderer="" button-next="" arrow="">

                       <!--css-build:shady-->

                       <yt-button-shape>

                        <button class="yt-spec-button-shape-next yt-spec-button-shape-next--text yt-spec-button-shape-next--mono yt-spec-button-shape-next--size-m yt-spec-button-shape-next--icon-only-default yt-spec-button-shape-next--enable-backdrop-filter-experiment" title="" aria-label="" aria-disabled="false">

                         <div aria-hidden="true" class="yt-spec-button-shape-next__icon">

                          <span class="ytIconWrapperHost" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;"><span class="yt-icon-shape ytSpecIconShapeHost">

                            <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

                             <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                              <path d="M8.793 5.293a1 1 0 000 1.414L14.086 12l-5.293 5.293a1 1 0 101.414 1.414L16.914 12l-6.707-6.707a1 1 0 00-1.414 0Z"></path>

                          <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeStroke"></div>

                          <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeFill"></div>

                         </yt-touch-feedback-shape></button>

                       <tp-yt-paper-tooltip offset="8" disable-upgrade=""></tp-yt-paper-tooltip>

                      </ytd-button-renderer>

                     </div>

                    </div>

                   </div>

                   <div id="footer-section" class="style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer" hidden></div>

                  </div>

                  <div id="dismissed" class="style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer"></div>

                 </ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer>

                </div>

                <div id="menu" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden></div>

               </ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer>

              </div>

              <div id="buttons" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer"></div>

             </div>

            </div>

            <div id="dismissed" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer"></div>

            <yt-interaction id="interaction" class="extended style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

             <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-interaction--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_interaction.yt.interaction.css.js-->

             <div class="fill style-scope yt-interaction"></div>

            </yt-interaction>

           </ytd-video-renderer>

          </div>

          <div id="continuations" class="style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer"></div>

         </ytd-item-section-renderer><ytd-item-section-renderer class="style-scope ytd-section-list-renderer" first-lockup-no-top-margin="" lockup-container-type="3" not-sticky="" exp-fix-playlist-header="" enable-related-chips-caching="" secondary-grid-columns="2" use-height-hack="" top-spacing-zero="" page-subtype="search" header-style="">

          <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-item-section-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

          <div id="header" class=" style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer"></div>

            <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,third_party.javascript.youtube_components.tp_yt_paper_spinner_lite.tp.yt.paper.spinner.lite.css.js-->

              </div>

              <div class="circle-clipper right style-scope tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite">

              </div>

            </div>

          <div id="continuations" class="style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer"></div>

         </ytd-item-section-renderer><ytd-item-section-renderer class="style-scope ytd-section-list-renderer" first-lockup-no-top-margin="" lockup-container-type="3" not-sticky="" exp-fix-playlist-header="" enable-related-chips-caching="" secondary-grid-columns="2" use-height-hack="" top-spacing-zero="" page-subtype="search" header-style="">

          <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-item-section-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

          <div id="header" class=" style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer"></div>

          <div id="spinner-container" class="style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer"><tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite class="style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer" aria-hidden="true" aria-label="loading">

            <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,third_party.javascript.youtube_components.tp_yt_paper_spinner_lite.tp.yt.paper.spinner.lite.css.js-->

            <div id="spinnerContainer" class="  style-scope tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite">

             <div class="spinner-layer style-scope tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite">

              <div class="circle-clipper left style-scope tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite">

               <div class="circle style-scope tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite"></div>

              </div>

              <div class="circle-clipper right style-scope tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite">

               <div class="circle style-scope tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite"></div>

              </div>

             </div>

            </div>

           </tp-yt-paper-spinner-lite>

          </div>

          <div id="contents" class=" style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer">

           <ytd-video-renderer class="style-scope ytd-item-section-renderer" bigger-thumbs-style="BIG" lockup="true" is-search="" use-search-ui="" use-standard-config-width="" use-bigger-thumbs="" inline-title-icon="">

            <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-video-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

            <div id="dismissible" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer"><ytd-thumbnail use-hovered-property="" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer" size="large">

              <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-thumbnail--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

              <a id="thumbnail" class="yt-simple-endpoint inline-block style-scope ytd-thumbnail" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" rel="null" href="/watch?v=JOAqpdM36wI&pp=ygUESmF2YQ%3D%3D">

               <yt-image class="style-scope ytd-thumbnail">

                <img alt="true" class="ytCoreImageHost ytCoreImageFillParentHeight ytCoreImageFillParentWidth ytCoreImageContentModeScaleAspectFill" style="background-color: transparent;">

               </yt-image>

               <div id="overlays" class="style-scope ytd-thumbnail">

                <ytd-thumbnail-overlay-time-status-renderer class="style-scope ytd-thumbnail" hide-time-status="" overlay-style="DEFAULT">

                 <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-thumbnail-overlay-time-status-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

                 <ytd-badge-supported-renderer is-thumbnail-badge="" class="style-scope ytd-thumbnail-overlay-time-status-renderer" system-icons="">

                  <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-badge-supported-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

                  <dom-repeat id="repeat" as="badge" class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer">

                   <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

                  </dom-repeat>

                  <yt-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer"></yt-badge-supported-renderer>

                 </ytd-badge-supported-renderer>

                 <div class="thumbnail-overlay-badge-shape style-scope ytd-thumbnail-overlay-time-status-renderer">

                  <badge-shape class="yt-badge-shape yt-badge-shape--thumbnail-default yt-badge-shape--thumbnail-badge yt-badge-shape--typography" role="img" aria-label="8 horas, 48 minutos y 49 segundos">

                   <div class="yt-badge-shape__text">

                    8:48:49

                   </div>

                  </badge-shape>

                 </div>

                 <div id="time-status" class="style-scope ytd-thumbnail-overlay-time-status-renderer" hidden>

                  <yt-icon class="style-scope ytd-thumbnail-overlay-time-status-renderer" disable-upgrade="" hidden></yt-icon><span id="text" class="style-scope ytd-thumbnail-overlay-time-status-renderer" aria-label="8 horas, 48 minutos y 49 segundos"> 8:48:49 </span>

                   </g>

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">77</span>

                    <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

                  </div>

                  <div id="collapsed-title" role="button" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    Curso de Java y POO | 1 - Introducción | 2 - Contexto | 3 - Historia | 4 - Java Virtual Machine (JVM) | 5 - Características del lenguaje | 6 - Usos del lenguaje | 7 - Versiones de Java | 8 - Instalación | 9 - Editores de código | 10 - IDE IntelliJ Idea | 11 - Documentación oficial | 12 - Hola Mundo | 13 - Comentarios | 14 - Ejercicios: Primeros pasos | 15 - Variables y constantes | 16 - Tipos de datos primitivos | 17 - Ejercicios: Variables y constantes | 18 - Operadores aritméticos | 19 - Operadores de asignación | 20 - Operadores de comparación | 21 - Operadores lógicos | 22 - Operadores unarios | 23 - Ejercicios: Operadores | 24 - Strings | 25 - Concatenación | 26 - length | 27 - charAt | 28 - substring | 29 - toUpperCase / toLowerCase | 30 - contains | 31 - equals | 32 - trim y replace | 33 - format | 34 - Ejercicios: Strings | 35 - Condicionales | 36 - Sentencia if | 37 - Sentencia switch | 38 - Ejercicios: Condicionales | 39 - Estructuras de datos | 40 - Arrays | 41 - Listas | 42 - Sets | 43 - Maps | 44 - Ejercicios: Estructuras | 45 - Bucles | 46 - for | 47 - forEach | 48 - while / do while | 49 - Control de bucles | 50 - Ejercicios: Bucles | 51 - Funciones | 52 - Funciones sin parámetros ni retorno | 53 - Funciones con parámetros / Sobrecarga | 54 - Funciones con retorno | 55 - Ejercicios: Funciones | 56 - Programación Orientada a Objetos (POO) | 57 - Clases y objetos | 58 - Ejercicios: Clases y objetos | 59 - Modificadores de acceso | 60 - Ejercicios: Modificadores de acceso | 61 - Herencia | 62 - Ejercicios: Herencia | 63 - Polimorfismo | 64 - Ejercicios: Polimorfismo | 65 - Abstracción | 66 - Ejercicios: Abstracción | 67 - Composición | 68 - Excepciones | 69 - Manejo de excepciones | 70 - Lanzamiento de excepciones | 71 - Excepciones personalizadas | 72 - Ejercicios: Excepciones | 73 - Depuración de errores | 74 - Extras | 75 - Ejercicios: Extras | Próximos pasos

            <div id="fulfilled-layout" class="style-scope ytd-ad-slot-renderer">

             <ytd-in-feed-ad-layout-renderer class="style-scope ytd-ad-slot-renderer">

              <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-in-feed-ad-layout-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

              <div id="rendering-content" class="style-scope ytd-in-feed-ad-layout-renderer">

               <text-image-no-button-layout-view-model class="ytwTextImageNoButtonLayoutViewModelHost">

                <div class="ytwTextImageNoButtonLayoutViewModelHostImageHoverOverlayContainer">

                 <div class="ytwTextImageNoButtonLayoutViewModelHostImageHoverOverlayContainerImageContainer">

              <yt-lockup-metadata-view-model class="ytLockupMetadataViewModelHost ytLockupMetadataViewModelHorizontal ytLockupMetadataViewModelStandard ytLockupMetadataViewModelLegacyTypography">

               <div class="ytLockupMetadataViewModelTextContainer">

                <h3 class="ytLockupMetadataViewModelHeadingReset" title="🚀Curso JAVA para PRINCIPIANTES | DESDE CERO 💻| EXPLICACIÓN FÁCIL 💥 2025"><a href="/watch?v=6q7wHs6cH6Y&list=PLQxX2eiEaqbwxYrMUJ6gRz82mLzUeeJy9" class="ytLockupMetadataViewModelTitle" aria-haspopup="false" style=""><span class="ytAttributedStringHost ytAttributedStringWhiteSpacePreWrap" dir="auto" role="text" style="">🚀Curso JAVA para PRINCIPIANTES | DESDE CERO 💻| EXPLICACIÓN FÁCIL 💥 2025</span></a></h3>

                <div class="ytLockupMetadataViewModelMetadata">

                 <yt-content-metadata-view-model class="ytContentMetadataViewModelHost">

                  <div class="ytContentMetadataViewModelMetadataRow">

                   <span class="ytAttributedStringHost ytContentMetadataViewModelMetadataText ytAttributedStringWhiteSpacePreWrap ytAttributedStringLinkInheritColor" dir="auto" style=""><span class="" dir="auto" style="font-weight: 400;"><a class="ytAttributedStringLink ytAttributedStringLinkCallToActionColor ytAttributedStringLinkInheritColor" tabindex="0" href="/@TodoCode" target="" force-new-state="true">TodoCode</a></span></span><span aria-hidden="true" class="ytContentMetadataViewModelDelimiter"> • </span><span class="ytAttributedStringHost ytContentMetadataViewModelMetadataText ytAttributedStringWhiteSpacePreWrap ytAttributedStringLinkInheritColor" dir="auto" style=""><span class="" dir="auto" style="font-weight: 400;"><a class="ytAttributedStringLink ytAttributedStringLinkCallToActionColor ytAttributedStringLinkInheritColor" tabindex="0" href="/@TodoCode" target="" force-new-state="true">Curso</a></span></span>

                  </div>

                  <div class="ytContentMetadataViewModelMetadataRow">

                   <div class="ytContentMetadataViewModelSpacer"></div>

                  </div>

                  <div id="collapsed-title" role="button" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    Por qué aprender Java? | Que es Java? | Antes de empezar | Descargando las herramientas | Mi Primera App | Tipos primitivos | Variables primitivas | Strings | Caracteres de escape | Arrays | Multiples dimensiones | Constantes | Comentarios | Operadores aritméticos | Orden de las operaciones | Conversión de tipos | Clase Math | Formato de números | Clase Scanner | Ejercicio calculadora | Referencia VS Primitivo | var | Operadores de comparación | Operadores lógicos | if | Alcance | Operador ternario | Switch | Ejercicio | Solución | For | While | Aplicación de terminal | Do While | Break y continue | For Each | Ejercicio | Solución | Introducción a métodos | Parámetros y argumentos | Valor de retorno | Overloading | Parámetros como arrays | Alcance | Refactorización | Crear una clase | Propiedades | Valores iniciales | Métodos | Método constructor | Propiedades estáticas | Agradecimientos

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div>

                          <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-img-shadow--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_img_shadow.yt.img.shadow.css.js-->

                          <img id="img" draggable="false" class="style-scope yt-img-shadow" alt="">

                        </div>

                        <div id="details" class="style-scope ytd-macro-markers-list-item-renderer">

                         <h4 class="macro-markers style-scope ytd-macro-markers-list-item-renderer" title="Por qué aprender Java?">Por qué aprender Java?</h4>

                         <h4 class="problem-walkthroughs style-scope ytd-macro-markers-list-item-renderer" hidden title="Por qué aprender Java?">Por qué aprender Java?</h4>

                         <div id="time" class="style-scope ytd-macro-markers-list-item-renderer">

              <div id="expandable-metadata" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

               <ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer" show-prominent-label="" use-custom-colors="" style="--yt-lightsource-section1-color: rgba(114,63,57,1.000); --yt-lightsource-section2-color: rgba(51,28,25,1.000); --yt-lightsource-section3-color: rgba(38,21,19,1.000); --yt-lightsource-section4-color: rgba(25,14,12,1.000); --yt-lightsource-primary-title-color: rgba(255,232,229,1.000); --yt-lightsource-secondary-title-color: rgba(204,167,163,1.000); --yt-lightsource-icon-activated-color: rgba(255,232,229,1.000); --yt-lightsource-icon-inactive-color: rgba(147,121,118,1.000); --yt-lightsource-icon-disabled-color: rgba(89,70,67,0.949);">

                <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

                <div id="header" skip-key-interaction="" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                 <div id="left-section" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                  <div id="thumbnail" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-img-shadow object-fit="FILL" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer no-transition empty" style="background-color: transparent;">

                    <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-img-shadow--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_img_shadow.yt.img.shadow.css.js-->

                   </yt-img-shadow>

                  </div>

                  <div id="prominent-collapsed-label" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-icon class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" disable-upgrade="" hidden>

                   </yt-icon> <yt-formatted-string id="prominent-label-text" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">10</span>

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> capítulos</span>

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div>

                  <div id="timestamp" raised="" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" is-empty="">

                    <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

                    <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div>

                  <div id="collapsed-title" role="button" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    Lógica de Programación 👩‍💻 Aprende a programar en Java | Configuración | Comentarios | Variables | Constantes | Operadores | Condicionales | Funciones | Ciclos, Bucles, o Loops | Módulos

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div>

                  <div id="expanded-title-subtitle-group" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden><yt-icon id="expanded-title-icon" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" disable-upgrade="" hidden>

                   </yt-icon>

                   <div id="expanded-title-subtitle-text" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    <div id="expanded-title" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                      <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">Este video tiene </span>

                      <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">10</span>

                      <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> capítulos</span>

                     </yt-formatted-string>

                    </div>

                    <div id="expanded-subtitle" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden><a class="yt-simple-endpoint style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                      <yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" is-empty="">

                       <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

                       <yt-attributed-string class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"></yt-attributed-string>

                      </yt-formatted-string>

                      <yt-icon class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" disable-upgrade="" hidden>

                      </yt-icon> </a>

                    </div>

                   </div>

                  </div>

                 </div>

                 <div id="right-section" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                  <div id="info" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden></div>

                  <div id="collapsed-label" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden><yt-icon class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" disable-upgrade="" hidden>

                   </yt-icon> <yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">10</span>

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> capítulos</span>

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div>

                  <div id="expand" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                   <ytd-button-renderer class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" button-renderer="" button-next="">

                    <!--css-build:shady-->

                    <yt-button-shape>

                     <button class="yt-spec-button-shape-next yt-spec-button-shape-next--text yt-spec-button-shape-next--mono yt-spec-button-shape-next--size-m yt-spec-button-shape-next--icon-only-default yt-spec-button-shape-next--enable-backdrop-filter-experiment" title="" aria-label="Más" aria-disabled="false">

                      <div aria-hidden="true" class="yt-spec-button-shape-next__icon">

                       <span class="ytIconWrapperHost" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;"><span class="yt-icon-shape ytSpecIconShapeHost">

                         <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

                          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                           <path d="M18.707 8.793a1 1 0 00-1.414 0L12 14.086 6.707 8.793a1 1 0 10-1.414 1.414L12 16.914l6.707-6.707a1 1 0 000-1.414Z"></path>

                          </svg>

                         </div></span></span>

                      </div>

                      <yt-touch-feedback-shape aria-hidden="true" class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeHost ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeTouchResponse">

                       <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeStroke"></div>

                       <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeFill"></div>

                      </yt-touch-feedback-shape></button>

                    Introducción del curso | ¿Qué es Programar? | ¿Qué son los Lenguajes de Programación? | ¿Qué es Java? | Versiones de Java | ¿Qué es un IDE? | Herramientas necesarias | Instalaciones y Configuraciones | Sintaxis de Java | Primer Hola Mundo | Variables y Constantes | Tipos de datos | Declaración de variables | Reglas de variables | Ejercicio variables y tipos de datos | Operadores (Con Ejercicio) | Est. Condicionales | Condicional IF | Condicional IF + ELSE | Condicionales Múltiples (anidados) | Condicional Switch | Ej. Integrador Condicionales (Esc. Inglés) | Operador Ternario (Con ejercicio) | Ej. Integrador Condicionales (Mercería) | Casos de Prueba | Estructuras Repetitivas | Bucles controlados por contador y centinela | Bucle do While | Bucle While | Bucle For | Bucles Infinitos | Otros operadores | Ejercicios Prácticos | Ej. Integrador (Estacionamiento) | Arrays (Arreglos) | Arreglos Unidimensionales y Bidimensionales | Unidimensionales Vectores (Con ejercicio) | Bidimensionales Matrices (Con ejercicio) | Error por desbordamiento | Ejercicios Prácticos | Ejercicio Integrador | Modelo de Capas | Interfaz Gráfica de Usuario (IGU) | Contenedores Gráficos | Componentes Gráficos | Variables de Swing | Eventos | Métodos de Swing | Ej. Práctico IGU (Copiador) | Proyecto Final Sorteador | Próximos pasos
