              <a class="channel-link yt-simple-endpoint style-scope ytd-channel-renderer" href="/@java">

               <div id="avatar" class="style-scope ytd-channel-renderer">

                <yt-img-shadow class="style-scope ytd-channel-renderer no-transition empty" style="background-color: transparent;">

                 <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-img-shadow--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_img_shadow.yt.img.shadow.css.js-->

                 <img id="img" draggable="false" class="style-scope yt-img-shadow" alt="" height="136" width="136">

                </yt-img-shadow>

               </div></a>

             </div>

             <div id="info-section" class="style-scope ytd-channel-renderer">

              <a id="main-link" class="channel-link yt-simple-endpoint style-scope ytd-channel-renderer" href="/@java">

               <div id="info" class="style-scope ytd-channel-renderer">

                <ytd-channel-name id="channel-title" wrap-text="" class="style-scope ytd-channel-renderer">

                 <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-channel-name--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

                 <div id="container" class="style-scope ytd-channel-name">

                  <div id="text-container" class="style-scope ytd-channel-name"><yt-formatted-string id="text" link-inherit-color="" respect-lang-dir="" title="" class="style-scope ytd-channel-name" dir="auto" style="text-align: left;">

                    Java

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div><tp-yt-paper-tooltip aria-hidden="true" fit-to-visible-bounds="" class="style-scope ytd-channel-name" role="tooltip" tabindex="-1" aria-label="tooltip">

                   <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:tp-yt-paper-tooltip--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,third_party.javascript.youtube_components.tp_yt_paper_tooltip.tp.yt.paper.tooltip.css.js-->

                   <div id="tooltip" class="hidden style-scope tp-yt-paper-tooltip" style-target="tooltip">

                    Java

                   </div>

                  </tp-yt-paper-tooltip>

                 </div>

                 <ytd-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-channel-name" system-icons="">

                  <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-badge-supported-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

                  <dom-repeat id="repeat" as="badge" class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer">

                   <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

                  </dom-repeat>

                  <yt-badge-supported-renderer class="ytBadgeSupportedRendererHost">

                   <div class="badge-shape ytBadgeSupportedRendererBadgeShape ytBadgeSupportedRendererBadgeShapeStyleTypeVerifiedArtist">

                    <yt-metadata-badge-renderer class="ytMetadataBadgeRendererHost">

                     <badge-shape class="yt-badge-shape yt-badge-shape--default yt-badge-shape--no-text yt-badge-shape--modern yt-badge-shape--typography" role="img" aria-label="Verificada">

                      <div class="yt-badge-shape__icon">

                       <span class="yt-icon-shape ytSpecIconShapeHost">

                        <div style="width: 24px; height: 24px; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

                         <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                          <path d="M12 1C5.925 1 1 5.925 1 12s4.925 11 11 11 11-4.925 11-11S18.075 1 12 1Zm5.707 7.293a1 1 0 010 1.414L10 17.414l-3.707-3.707a1 1 0 111.414-1.414L10 14.586l6.293-6.293a1 1 0 011.414 0Z"></path>

                         </svg>

                        </div></span>

                      </div>

                      <div class="yt-badge-shape__text"></div>

                     </badge-shape>

                    </yt-metadata-badge-renderer>

                   </div>

                  </yt-badge-supported-renderer>

                 </ytd-badge-supported-renderer>

                </ytd-channel-name>

                <div id="metadata" class="style-scope ytd-channel-renderer">

                 <yt-formatted-string id="subscribers" respect-lang-dir="" class="style-scope ytd-channel-renderer" dir="auto" style="text-align: left;">

                  @java

                 </yt-formatted-string><span id="dot" class="style-scope ytd-channel-renderer">•</span><span id="video-count" class="style-scope ytd-channel-renderer">260 k suscriptores</span>

                </div><yt-formatted-string id="description" class="style-scope ytd-channel-renderer">

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">The official </span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> channel covering the </span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> platform, OpenJDK, and the </span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> ecosystem. Make sure to check https://inside.</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">java</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> ...</span>

                </yt-formatted-string><ytd-badge-supported-renderer id="badges" class="style-scope ytd-channel-renderer" system-icons="" hidden>

                    <button class="yt-spec-button-shape-next yt-spec-button-shape-next--text yt-spec-button-shape-next--mono yt-spec-button-shape-next--size-m yt-spec-button-shape-next--icon-button yt-spec-button-shape-next--enable-backdrop-filter-experiment" title="" aria-label="Mi centro de anuncios" aria-disabled="false" style="">

                     <div aria-hidden="true" class="yt-spec-button-shape-next__icon">

                         <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                      <div class="ytSpecTouchFeedbackShapeStroke"></div>

                <yt-formatted-string class="metadata-snippet-text-navigation style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

                 <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">java</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> #javatutorial #javacourse </span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> tutorial for beginners full course 2025 *My original </span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> 12 Hour course* ...</span>

                </yt-formatted-string> </a> <yt-formatted-string class="metadata-snippet-text style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

                <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">java</span>

                <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> #javatutorial #javacourse </span>

                <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> tutorial for beginners full course 2025 *My original </span>

               </tp-yt-paper-tooltip>

              </div><dom-repeat class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

               <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

              </dom-repeat> <ytd-badge-supported-renderer id="badges" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer" system-icons="">

               <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-badge-supported-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

               <dom-repeat id="repeat" as="badge" class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer">

                <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

               </dom-repeat>

                  <div id="collapsed-title" role="button" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    1.introduction to java | 2.variables | 3.user input ⌨️ | 4.mad libs game | 5.arithmetic | 6.shopping cart program | 7.if statements | 8.random numbers | 9.math class | 10.printf 🖨️ | 11.compound interest calculator | 12.nested if statements 🎟️ | 13.string methods | 14.substrings | 15.weight converter 🏋️ | 16.ternary operator | 17.temperature converter 🌡️ | 18.enhanced switches | 19.calculator program | 20.logical operators | 21.while loops ♾️ | 22.number guessing game | 23.for loops | 24.break & continue | 25.nested loops | 26.methods | 27.overloaded methods | 28.variable scope | 29.banking program | 30.dice roller program | 31.arrays | 32.enter user input into an array ➡️ | 33.search an array | 34.varargs | 35.2d arrays | 36.quiz game | 37.rock paper scissors | 38.slot machine | 39.object-oriented programming | 40.constructors | 41.overloaded constructors 🛠️ | 42.array of objects 🗃️ | 43.static | 44.inheritance 👨‍👧‍ | 45.super | 46.method overriding ♻️ | 47.tostring method | 48.abstraction 🌫️ | 49.interfaces | 50.polymorphism | 51.runtime polymorphism 🤷‍♂️ | 52.getters and setters | 53.aggregation | 54.composition ⚙️ | 55.wrapper classes | 56.arraylists | 57.exception handling ⚠️ | 58.write files | 59.read files | 60.music player | 61.hangman game | 62.dates & times | 63.anonymous classes 🕵️‍♂️ | 64.timertasks ⏲️ | 65.countdown timer | 66.generics | 67.hashmaps 🗺️ | 68.enums | 69.threading | 70.multithreading | 71.alarm clock

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  <div class="text-wrapper style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

                   <div id="meta" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

                    <div id="title-wrapper" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

                     <h3 class="title-and-badge style-scope ytd-video-renderer"><ytd-badge-supported-renderer collection-truncate="" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer" system-icons="" hidden>

                       <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-badge-supported-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

                       <dom-repeat id="repeat" as="badge" class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer">

                        <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

                       </dom-repeat>

                       <yt-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer"></yt-badge-supported-renderer>

                      </ytd-badge-supported-renderer> <a id="video-title" class="yt-simple-endpoint style-scope ytd-video-renderer" title="¡INSTALAR MINECRAFT JAVA + BEDROCK CUALQUIER VERSION! 2026✅(GRATIS)" aria-label="¡INSTALAR MINECRAFT JAVA + BEDROCK CUALQUIER VERSION! 2026✅(GRATIS) 10 minutos y 6 segundos" href="/watch?v=1FtF1dT5QZY&pp=ygUESmF2YQ%3D%3D">

                       <yt-icon id="inline-title-icon" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer" hidden>

                        <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-icon--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.core.yt_icon.yt.icon.css.js-->

                       </yt-icon>

                       <yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer" aria-label="¡INSTALAR MINECRAFT JAVA + BEDROCK CUALQUIER VERSION! 2026✅(GRATIS) 10 minutos y 6 segundos">

                   <div class="metadata-snippet-container-one-line style-scope ytd-video-renderer style-scope ytd-video-renderer"><a class="yt-simple-endpoint metadata-snippet-timestamp style-scope ytd-video-renderer" hidden> <span id="time" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer"></span>

                     <yt-formatted-string class="metadata-snippet-text-navigation style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

                      <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">Today, I tried to make Bedrock Edition unrecognisable! Or, at least, only recognisable to </span>

                      <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                      <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> Players... </span>

                      <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                      <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> Combat: ...</span>

                     </yt-formatted-string> </a> <yt-formatted-string class="metadata-snippet-text style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

                     <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">Today, I tried to make Bedrock Edition unrecognisable! Or, at least, only recognisable to </span>

                     <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                     <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> Players... </span>

                     <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                     <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> Combat: ...</span>

                     <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:tp-yt-paper-tooltip--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,third_party.javascript.youtube_components.tp_yt_paper_tooltip.tp.yt.paper.tooltip.css.js-->

                              <path d="M13.793 5.293 7.086 12l6.707 6.707a1 1 0 101.414-1.414L9.914 12l5.293-5.293a1 1 0 10-1.414-1.414Z"></path>

                 </ytd-badge-supported-renderer> <a id="video-title" class="yt-simple-endpoint style-scope ytd-video-renderer" title="Arquitectura de la JVM — Cómo funciona realmente Java" aria-label="Arquitectura de la JVM — Cómo funciona realmente Java 27 minutos" href="/watch?v=QfOHeFjUOwg&pp=ygUESmF2YQ%3D%3D">

                        <path d="M12 4a2 2 0 100 4 2 2 0 000-4Zm0 6a2 2 0 100 4 2 2 0 000-4Zm0 6a2 2 0 100 4 2 2 0 000-4Z"></path>

              <div class="metadata-snippet-container-one-line style-scope ytd-video-renderer style-scope ytd-video-renderer"><a class="yt-simple-endpoint metadata-snippet-timestamp style-scope ytd-video-renderer" hidden> <span id="time" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer"></span>

                <yt-formatted-string class="metadata-snippet-text-navigation style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">Descubre cómo funciona realmente la JVM (</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> Virtual Machine): desde el ciclo de vida de un programa </span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                 <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> hasta su ...</span>

                </yt-formatted-string> </a> <yt-formatted-string class="metadata-snippet-text style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

                <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">Descubre cómo funciona realmente la JVM (</span>

                <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> Virtual Machine): desde el ciclo de vida de un programa </span>

                <span dir="auto" class="bold style-scope yt-formatted-string" style-target="bold">Java</span>

                <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> hasta su ...</span>

               </yt-formatted-string> <tp-yt-paper-tooltip class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer" role="tooltip" tabindex="-1" aria-label="tooltip">

                <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:tp-yt-paper-tooltip--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,third_party.javascript.youtube_components.tp_yt_paper_tooltip.tp.yt.paper.tooltip.css.js-->

              </div><dom-repeat class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

               <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

              </dom-repeat> <ytd-badge-supported-renderer id="badges" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer" system-icons="" hidden>

               <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-badge-supported-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

               <dom-repeat id="repeat" as="badge" class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer">

                <template is="dom-repeat"></template>

               </dom-repeat>

               <yt-badge-supported-renderer class="style-scope ytd-badge-supported-renderer"></yt-badge-supported-renderer>

              </ytd-badge-supported-renderer>

              <div id="expandable-metadata" class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer">

               <ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer class="style-scope ytd-video-renderer" show-prominent-label="" use-custom-colors="" style="--yt-lightsource-section1-color: rgba(27,67,127,1.000); --yt-lightsource-section2-color: rgba(11,26,51,1.000); --yt-lightsource-section3-color: rgba(8,20,38,1.000); --yt-lightsource-section4-color: rgba(5,13,25,1.000); --yt-lightsource-primary-title-color: rgba(229,239,255,1.000); --yt-lightsource-secondary-title-color: rgba(163,179,204,1.000); --yt-lightsource-icon-activated-color: rgba(229,239,255,1.000); --yt-lightsource-icon-inactive-color: rgba(118,130,147,1.000); --yt-lightsource-icon-disabled-color: rgba(73,82,96,0.949);">

                <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

                <div id="header" skip-key-interaction="" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                 <div id="left-section" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                  <div id="thumbnail" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-img-shadow object-fit="FILL" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer no-transition empty" style="background-color: transparent;">

                    <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-img-shadow--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_img_shadow.yt.img.shadow.css.js-->

                    <img id="img" draggable="false" class="style-scope yt-img-shadow" alt="">

                   </yt-img-shadow>

                  </div>

                  <div id="prominent-collapsed-label" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-icon class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" disable-upgrade="" hidden>

                   </yt-icon> <yt-formatted-string id="prominent-label-text" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">12</span>

                <div id="header" skip-key-interaction="" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-img-shadow--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_img_shadow.yt.img.shadow.css.js-->

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">6</span>

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string"> momentos</span>

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div>

                  <div id="timestamp" raised="" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" is-empty="">

                    <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div>

                  <div id="collapsed-title" role="button" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    STAR7 PERSONAL DIGITAL ASSISTANT | ENTERPRISE WEB APPS | NASA'S MAESTRO MARS ROVER | BOOLEAN CHAR BYTE SHORT INT LONG FLOAT | GARBAGE COLLECTION RUNTIME TYPE CHECKING REFLECTION | JDK

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  <div id="expanded-title-subtitle-group" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden><yt-icon id="expanded-title-icon" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" disable-upgrade="" hidden>

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">6</span>

                <div id="content" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden>

                 <ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" at-start="" at-end="" mini-guide-visible="" is-search="" use-custom-colors="" card-list-style="HORIZONTAL_CARD_LIST_STYLE_TYPE_ENGAGEMENT_PANEL_SECTION" modern-chapters="" style="--ytd-horizontal-card-list-item-width: 0px;">

                  <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js-->

                  <div id="dismissible" class="style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer">

                   <div id="header-container" class="style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer">

                    <h2 id="header" class="style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer" hidden></h2>

                    <div id="sort-filter" class="style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer"></div>

                    <div id="header-button" class="style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer"></div>

                   </div>

                   <div id="shelf-container" class="style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer">

                    <div id="left-arrow-container" class="arrow-container style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer" hidden>

                     <div id="left-arrow" class="arrow center-aligned style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer" hidden><yt-icon icon="yt-icons:chevron_left" class="style-scope ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer">

                       <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-icon--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.core.yt_icon.yt.icon.css.js-->

                       <span class="yt-icon-shape style-scope yt-icon ytSpecIconShapeHost">

                        <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

                         <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                          <path d="M13.793 5.293 7.086 12l6.707 6.707a1 1 0 101.414-1.414L9.914 12l5.293-5.293a1 1 0 10-1.414-1.414Z"></path>

                         </svg>

                        </div></span>

                      </yt-icon>

                     </div>

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">38</span>

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  <div id="collapsed-title" role="button" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer"><yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    Introducción al Curso | ¿Cómo funciona una Webapp? | ¿Cómo funciona un servidor? (Google Cloud) | ¿Cómo registrar un dominio? | Instalación de IntelliJ Idea | Crear un proyecto con Spring Framework | ¿Qué es Maven y qué es Gradle? | Instalación de Maven | Instalación de JDK | Estructura del Proyecto | Hola Mundo | Solución de errores típicos al compilar | Creación de Controladores | Template para el Panel de Administración | ¿Qué es JSON y XML? | Estructura de una URL | ¿Qué son los Métodos HTTP? | Arquitectura MVC | ¿Qué es REST? | ¿Qué es un Framework? | Creación de Servicio REST | Llamar a una API con AJAX | Creación de una Base de Datos | DAO Layer y conexión con Base de Datos | Repository con Hibernate | Lombock | Inyección de Dependencias | Listar Usuarios | Eliminar Usuarios | Registrar Usuarios | Iniciar Sesión | ¿Qué es HASH y cómo funcionan las Contraseñas? | Implementación de Argon2 | ¿Cómo funciona una Sesión de Usuario? | ¿Qué es JWT y cómo funciona? | Implementación de JWT | Repositorios de Código | Creación de Repositorio en GitHub | Resolver conflictos | Despedida | Bloopers

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  </div>

                       <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-formatted-string--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_formatted_string.yt.formatted.string.css.js-->

                  <div id="collapsed-label" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" hidden><yt-icon class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" disable-upgrade="" hidden>

                   </yt-icon> <yt-formatted-string class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                    <span dir="auto" class="style-scope yt-formatted-string">11</span>

                   </yt-formatted-string>

                  <div id="expand" class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer">

                   <ytd-button-renderer class="style-scope ytd-expandable-metadata-renderer" button-renderer="" button-next="">

                    <!--css-build:shady-->

                    <yt-button-shape>

              </div><button class="ytp-playlist-menu-button ytp-button" title="" aria-owns="ytp-id-20" aria-haspopup="true" aria-label="Playlist" data-overlay-order="3" style="display: none;">

               <div class="ytp-playlist-menu-button-icon">

                <svg height="100%" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 36 36" width="100%">

                 <use class="ytp-svg-shadow" xlink:href="#ytp-id-21"></use><path d="m 22.53,21.42 0,6.85 5.66,-3.42 -5.66,-3.42 0,0 z m -11.33,0 9.06,0 0,2.28 -9.06,0 0,-2.28 0,0 z m 0,-9.14 13.6,0 0,2.28 -13.6,0 0,-2.28 0,0 z m 0,4.57 13.6,0 0,2.28 -13.6,0 0,-2.28 0,0 z" fill="#fff" id="ytp-id-21"></path>

                </svg>

               </div>

               <div class="ytp-playlist-menu-button-title"></div>

               <div class="ytp-playlist-menu-button-text"></div></button>

             </div>

             <div class="ytp-overlay-bottom-left">

              <div class="ytp-suggested-action" data-overlay-order="7" style="display: none;">

               <button class="ytp-button ytp-suggested-action-badge ytp-suggested-action-badge-with-controls" style="display: none;">

                <div class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-icon-container"></div>

                <div class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-expanded-content-container" style="display: none;">

                 <label class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-title"></label>

                </div></button><button class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-dismiss-button-icon ytp-button"></button>

              </div>

             </div>

             <div class="ytp-suggested-action" data-overlay-order="8" style="display: none;">

              <button class="ytp-button ytp-suggested-action-badge ytp-suggested-action-badge-with-controls ytp-suggested-action-badge-expanded" aria-label="" style="display: none; width: 40px;">

               <div class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-icon-container">

                <div class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-icon" aria-hidden="true"></div>

               </div>

               <div class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-expanded-content-container" style="">

                <label class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-title"></label>

               </div></button><button class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-dismiss-button-icon ytp-button" aria-label=""></button>

             </div>

            </div>

            <div class="ytp-suggested-action" data-overlay-order="9" style="display: none;">

             <div class="ytp-button ytp-suggested-action-badge ytp-suggested-action-badge-with-controls ytp-featured-product ytp-timely-shelf-present" style="display: none;">

              <div class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-icon-container"></div>

              <div class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-expanded-content-container" style="display: none;">

               <label class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-title"></label><button class="ytp-suggested-action-badge-dismiss-button-icon ytp-button" style="display: none;"></button><a class="ytp-featured-product-container">

                <div class="ytp-featured-product-thumbnail">

                 <img>

                 <div class="ytp-featured-product-open-in-new"></div>

                </div>

                <div class="ytp-featured-product-details">

                 <text class="ytp-featured-product-title"></text>

                 <div class="ytp-featured-product-price-container">

                  <text class="ytp-featured-product-price-when-promotion-text-enabled" aria-hidden="true"></text><text class="ytp-featured-product-promotion-text" aria-hidden="true"></text>

                 </div>

                 <div class="ytp-featured-product-when-promotion-text-enabled">

                  <text class="ytp-featured-product-affiliate-disclaimer-when-promotion-text-enabled"></text>

                  <div class="ytp-featured-product-trending" style="display: none;">

                   <div class="ytp-featured-product-trending-icon"></div><text class="ytp-featured-product-trending-text"></text>

                  </div><text class="ytp-featured-product-vendor-when-promotion-text-enabled"></text>

                 </div>

                </div><button class="ytp-featured-product-overflow-icon ytp-button" aria-haspopup="true" style=""></button></a>

              </div>

             </div>

            </div>

           </div>

           <div class="ytp-overlay-bottom-right">

            <div class="ytp-overlay-inline-container" data-overlay-order="0">

             <div class="ytp-player-content ytp-timely-actions-content" data-overlay-order="10" style=""></div>

            </div>

           </div>

          </div>

          <div class="ytp-spinner" data-layer="4" style="display: none;">

           <div class="ytp-spinner-container">

            <div class="ytp-spinner-rotator">

             <div class="ytp-spinner-left">

              <div class="ytp-spinner-circle"></div>

             </div>

             <div class="ytp-spinner-right">

              <div class="ytp-spinner-circle"></div>

             </div>

            </div>

           </div>

           <div class="ytp-spinner-message" style="display: none;">

            Si la reproducción no comienza en breve, intenta reiniciar el dispositivo.

           </div>

          </div>

          <div data-layer="4" style="display: none;">

           <div class="ytp-bezel-text-wrapper">

            <div class="ytp-bezel-text"></div>

           </div>

           <div class="ytp-bezel" role="status">

            <div class="ytp-bezel-icon"></div>

           </div>

          </div>

          <div class="ytp-seek-overlay" data-layer="4" style="display: none;">

           <div class="ytp-seek-overlay-animation ytp-seek-overlay-animation-back">

            <div class="ytp-seek-overlay-arrow ytp-seek-overlay-arrow-persistent">

             <svg viewbox="0 0 22 32" width="22" height="24">

              <path d="M 18 4 L 6 16 L 18 28" stroke="white" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"></path>

             </svg>

            </div>

            <div class="ytp-seek-overlay-duration"></div>

           </div>

           <div class="ytp-seek-overlay-animation ytp-seek-overlay-animation-forward">

            <div class="ytp-seek-overlay-duration"></div>

            <div class="ytp-seek-overlay-arrow ytp-seek-overlay-arrow-persistent">

             <svg viewbox="0 0 22 32" width="22" height="24">

              <path d="M 4 4 L 16 16 L 4 28" stroke="white" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"></path>

             </svg>

            </div>

           </div>

           <div class="ytp-seek-overlay-message">

            <div class="ytp-seek-overlay-message-icon"></div>

            <div class="ytp-seek-overlay-message-text"></div>

           </div>

          </div>

          <div data-layer="4" aria-live="polite" style="display: none;">

           <div class="ytp-tooltip-text-wrapper">

            <div class="ytp-tooltip-edu">

             <svg height="100%" viewbox="0 0 36 36" width="100%">

              <path d="M14.1 36.75 12 34.65 24 22.65 36 34.65 33.9 36.75 24 26.85ZM14.1 24.1 12 22 24 10 36 22 33.9 24.1 24 14.2Z"></path>

             </svg><span></span>

            </div>

            <div class="ytp-tooltip-image"></div>

            <div class="ytp-tooltip-title">

             <span></span>

             <div class="ytp-tooltip-keyboard-shortcut"></div>

            </div>

            <div class="ytp-tooltip-bottom-text">

             <span class="ytp-tooltip-text"></span>

             <div class="ytp-tooltip-keyboard-shortcut"></div>

            </div>

            <div class="ytp-tooltip-progress-bar-pill">

             <div class="ytp-tooltip-progress-bar-pill-time-stamp"></div>

             <div class="ytp-tooltip-progress-bar-pill-title"></div>

            </div>

           </div>

           <div class="ytp-tooltip-bg">

            <div class="ytp-tooltip-duration"></div>

           </div>

          </div>

          <div class="ytp-player-content ytp-iv-player-content" data-layer="4" style="display: none;">

           <div class="ytp-free-preview-countdown-timer">

            <span></span><span class="ytp-free-preview-countdown-timer-separator">•</span><span></span>

           </div>

          </div>

          <div class="video-ads ytp-ad-module" data-layer="4"></div>

          <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-countdown-overlay" data-layer="4" style="display: none;">

           <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-countdown-container ytp-autonav-endscreen-small-mode ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-no-alternative-header">

            <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-container">

             <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-topbar-container">

              <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-header">

               A continuación

              </div>

              <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-alternative-header"></div>

             </div><a class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-link-container" target="">

              <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-thumbnail" style="">

               <div class="ytp-autonav-timestamp"></div>

               <div class="ytp-autonav-live-stamp">

                En vivo

               </div>

               <div class="ytp-autonav-upcoming-stamp">

                Próximamente

               </div>

              </div>

              <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-video-info">

               <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-premium-badge"></div>

               <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-title"></div>

               <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-author"></div>

               <div class="ytp-autonav-view-and-date"></div>

               <div class="ytp-autonav-author-and-view"></div>

              </div></a>

            </div>

            <div class="ytp-autonav-overlay" style="width: 504px;"></div>

            <div class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-button-container" style="display: none;">

             <button class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-button ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-cancel-button ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-button-rounded" aria-label="Cancelar reproducción automática">Cancelar</button><a class="ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-button ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-play-button ytp-autonav-endscreen-upnext-button-rounded" role="button" aria-label="Reproducir siguiente video">Reproducir ahora</a>

            </div>

           </div>

          </div>

          <div class="html5-endscreen ytp-player-content videowall-endscreen" data-layer="4" style="display: none;">

           <button class="ytp-button ytp-endscreen-previous" aria-label="Anterior">

            <svg height="100%" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 32 32" width="100%">

             <path d="M 19.41,20.09 14.83,15.5 19.41,10.91 18,9.5 l -6,6 6,6 z" fill="#fff"></path>

            </svg></button>

           <div class="ytp-endscreen-content"></div><button class="ytp-button ytp-endscreen-next" aria-label="Siguiente">

            <svg height="100%" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 32 32" width="100%">

             <path d="m 12.59,20.34 4.58,-4.59 -4.58,-4.59 1.41,-1.41 6,6 -6,6 z" fill="#fff"></path>

            </svg></button>

          </div>

          <div class="ytp-caption-window-container" id="ytp-caption-window-container" data-layer="4"></div>

          <div class="ytp-playlist-menu" role="dialog" id="ytp-id-20" data-layer="5" style="display: none;">

           <div class="ytp-playlist-menu-header">

            <div class="ytp-playlist-menu-title">

             <a class="ytp-playlist-menu-title-name"></a><button class="ytp-playlist-menu-close ytp-button" aria-label="Cerrar">

              <svg height="100%" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="100%">

               <path d="M19 6.41L17.59 5 12 10.59 6.41 5 5 6.41 10.59 12 5 17.59 6.41 19 12 13.41 17.59 19 19 17.59 13.41 12z" fill="#fff"></path>

              </svg></button>

            </div>

            <div class="ytp-playlist-menu-subtitle"></div>

           </div>

           <div class="ytp-playlist-menu-items" role="menu"></div>

          </div>

          <div class="ytp-share-panel" id="ytp-id-23" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="ytp-id-22" data-layer="5" style="display: none;">

           <div class="ytp-share-panel-inner-content">

            <div class="ytp-share-panel-title" id="ytp-id-22">

             Compartir

            </div><a class="ytp-share-panel-link ytp-no-contextmenu" target="_blank" title="Compartir vínculo"></a><label class="ytp-share-panel-include-playlist"><input class="ytp-share-panel-include-playlist-checkbox" type="checkbox" checked="true">Incluir playlist</label>

            <div class="ytp-share-panel-loading-spinner">

             <div class="ytp-spinner-container">

              <div class="ytp-spinner-rotator">

               <div class="ytp-spinner-left">

                <div class="ytp-spinner-circle"></div>

               </div>

               <div class="ytp-spinner-right">

                <div class="ytp-spinner-circle"></div>

               </div>

              </div>

             </div>

            </div>

            <div class="ytp-share-panel-service-buttons"></div>

            <div class="ytp-share-panel-error">

             Error al recuperar la información de uso compartido. Vuelve a intentarlo más tarde.

            </div>

           </div><button class="ytp-share-panel-close ytp-button" title="Cerrar">

            <svg height="100%" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="100%">

             <path d="M19 6.41L17.59 5 12 10.59 6.41 5 5 6.41 10.59 12 5 17.59 6.41 19 12 13.41 17.59 19 19 17.59 13.41 12z" fill="#fff"></path>

            </svg></button>

          </div>

          <div class="ytp-overflow-panel" id="ytp-id-28" role="dialog" data-layer="5" style="display: none;">

           <div class="ytp-overflow-panel-content">

            <div class="ytp-overflow-panel-action-buttons">

             <button class="ytp-watch-later-button ytp-button" title="" data-tooltip-opaque="false" data-tooltip-title="Ver más tarde" aria-label="Ver más tarde" style="display: none;">

              <div class="ytp-watch-later-icon">

               <svg height="100%" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 36 36" width="100%">

                <use class="ytp-svg-shadow" xlink:href="#ytp-id-24"></use><path class="ytp-svg-fill" d="M18,8 C12.47,8 8,12.47 8,18 C8,23.52 12.47,28 18,28 C23.52,28 28,23.52 28,18 C28,12.47 23.52,8 18,8 L18,8 Z M16,19.02 L16,12.00 L18,12.00 L18,17.86 L23.10,20.81 L22.10,22.54 L16,19.02 Z" id="ytp-id-24"></path>

               </svg>

              </div>

              <div class="ytp-watch-later-title">

               Ver más tarde

              </div></button><button class="ytp-button ytp-share-button ytp-share-button-visible" title="" data-tooltip-title="Compartir" aria-haspopup="true" aria-owns="ytp-id-23" data-tooltip-opaque="false" aria-label="Compartir" style="">

              <div class="ytp-share-icon">

               <svg height="100%" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 36 36" width="100%">

                <use class="ytp-svg-shadow" xlink:href="#ytp-id-33"></use><path class="ytp-svg-fill" d="m 20.20,14.19 0,-4.45 7.79,7.79 -7.79,7.79 0,-4.56 C 16.27,20.69 12.10,21.81 9.34,24.76 8.80,25.13 7.60,27.29 8.12,25.65 9.08,21.32 11.80,17.18 15.98,15.38 c 1.33,-0.60 2.76,-0.98 4.21,-1.19 z" id="ytp-id-33"></path>

               </svg>

              </div>

              <div class="ytp-share-title">

               Compartir

              </div></button><button class="ytp-button ytp-copylink-button" title="" data-tooltip-opaque="false" data-tooltip-title="Copiar vínculo" aria-label="Copiar vínculo" style="display: none;">

              <div class="ytp-copylink-icon">

               <svg height="100%" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 36 36" width="100%">

                <use class="ytp-svg-shadow" xlink:href="#ytp-id-32"></use><path class="ytp-svg-fill" d="M21.9,8.3H11.3c-0.9,0-1.7,.8-1.7,1.7v12.3h1.7V10h10.6V8.3z M24.6,11.8h-9.7c-1,0-1.8,.8-1.8,1.8v12.3  c0,1,.8,1.8,1.8,1.8h9.7c1,0,1.8-0.8,1.8-1.8V13.5C26.3,12.6,25.5,11.8,24.6,11.8z M24.6,25.9h-9.7V13.5h9.7V25.9z" id="ytp-id-32"></path>

               </svg>

              </div>

              <div class="ytp-copylink-title" aria-hidden="true">

               Copiar vínculo

              </div></button>

            </div>

           </div><button class="ytp-overflow-panel-close ytp-button" data-tooltip-title="Cerrar" title="" aria-label="Cerrar">

            <svg height="100%" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="100%">

             <path d="M19 6.41L17.59 5 12 10.59 6.41 5 5 6.41 10.59 12 5 17.59 6.41 19 12 13.41 17.59 19 19 17.59 13.41 12z" fill="#fff"></path>

            </svg></button>

          </div>

         </ytd-player>

        </div>

       </div>

      </div>

     </div>

     <div id="overlays" class="style-scope ytd-video-preview"></div>

     <div id="player-controls" class="style-scope ytd-video-preview"><yt-inline-player-controls class="ytInlinePlayerControlsHost">

       <div class="ytInlinePlayerControlsDarkenedOverlay"></div>

       <div class="ytInlinePlayerControlsTopLeftControls"></div>

       <yt-bigboard></yt-bigboard>

       <div>

        <div class="ytInlinePlayerControlsTopRightControls">

         <div class="ytInlinePlayerControlsTopRightControlsCircleButton">

          <div class="ytInlinePlayerControlsButtonIcon">

           <yt-mute-toggle-button>

            <ytm-mute-button class="ytmMuteButtonHost">

             <button class="ytmMuteButtonButton" title="Activar sonido" aria-label="Activar sonido"><span><span class="ytIconWrapperHost"><span class="yt-icon-shape ytSpecIconShapeHost">

                 <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

                  <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                   <path d="M11.485 2.143 3.913 6.687A6 6 0 001 11.832v.338a6 6 0 002.913 5.144l7.572 4.543A1 1 0 0013 21V3a1.001 1.001 0 00-1.515-.857Zm9.808 6.15L19 10.586l-2.293-2.293a1 1 0 10-1.414 1.414L17.586 12l-2.293 2.293a1 1 0 101.414 1.414L19 13.414l2.293 2.293a1 1 0 101.414-1.414L20.414 12l2.293-2.293a1 1 0 10-1.414-1.414Z"></path>

                  </svg>

                 </div></span></span></span></button>

            </ytm-mute-button>

           </yt-mute-toggle-button>

          </div>

         </div>

         <div class="ytInlinePlayerControlsTopRightControlsCircleButton">

          <div class="ytInlinePlayerControlsButtonIcon">

           <yt-closed-captions-toggle-button>

            <ytm-closed-captioning-button class="ytmClosedCaptioningButtonHost">

             <button class="ytmClosedCaptioningButtonButton" title="Se desactivaron los subtítulos" aria-label="Se desactivaron los subtítulos" aria-pressed="false"><span class="ytIconWrapperHost ytmClosedCaptioningButtonYtIconOverlay"><span class="yt-icon-shape ytSpecIconShapeHost">

                <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; fill: currentcolor;">

                 <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" style="pointer-events: none; display: inherit; width: 100%; height: 100%;">

                  <path d="M21 3H3a2 2 0 00-2 2v14a2 2 0 002 2h18a2 2 0 002-2V5a2 2 0 00-2-2ZM3 19V5h18v14H3ZM6.972 8.346c-.631.336-1.131.881-1.466 1.526A4.6 4.6 0 005 12c-.004.74.17 1.47.506 2.128.336.645.835 1.191 1.466 1.526a2.86 2.86 0 002.066.257c.697-.178 1.294-.606 1.737-1.176a1 1 0 00-1.578-1.228c-.21.27-.444.413-.654.467a.86.86 0 01-.632-.085c-.222-.119-.453-.342-.631-.684A2.64 2.64 0 017 12a2.6 2.6 0 01.281-1.205c.177-.342.408-.565.63-.684a.86.86 0 01.632-.085c.209.054.444.197.654.467a1 1 0 001.578-1.228c-.443-.57-1.04-.998-1.737-1.176a2.86 2.86 0 00-2.066.257Zm8 0c-.631.336-1.131.881-1.466 1.526A4.6 4.6 0 0013 12c-.004.74.17 1.47.506 2.128.336.645.835 1.191 1.466 1.526a2.86 2.86 0 002.066.257c.697-.178 1.294-.606 1.737-1.176a1 1 0 00-1.578-1.228c-.21.27-.444.413-.654.467a.86.86 0 01-.632-.085c-.222-.119-.453-.342-.631-.684A2.64 2.64 0 0115 12a2.6 2.6 0 01.281-1.205c.177-.342.408-.565.63-.684a.86.86 0 01.632-.085c.209.054.444.197.654.467a1 1 0 001.578-1.228c-.443-.57-1.04-.998-1.737-1.176a2.86 2.86 0 00-2.066.257Z"></path>

                 </svg>

                </div></span></span></button>

            </ytm-closed-captioning-button>

           </yt-closed-captions-toggle-button>

          </div>

         </div>

        </div>

        <div class="ytInlinePlayerControlsBottomRightControls">

         <div class="ytInlinePlayerControlsTimeDisplay" aria-label="Tiempo transcurrido 0:00">

          <badge-shape class="yt-badge-shape yt-badge-shape--thumbnail-default yt-badge-shape--thumbnail-badge yt-badge-shape--typography">

           <div class="yt-badge-shape__text">

            0:00

           </div>

          </badge-shape>

         </div>

        </div>

       </div>

      </yt-inline-player-controls> <dom-if if="[[!!playerControlsData]]" class="style-scope ytd-video-preview">

       <template is="dom-if"></template>

      </dom-if>

     </div>

     <div id="metadata" class="style-scope ytd-video-preview"></div>

    </ytd-video-preview>

   </div>

   <yt-ephemeral-actions class="ytEphemeralActionsHost" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></yt-ephemeral-actions>

   <yt-tooltip class="ytTooltipContainerHost" aria-hidden="true">

    <yt-popover popover="manual" class="ytPopoverComponentHost ytPopoverComponentHostSeeThrough"></yt-popover>

   </yt-tooltip>

   <dom-if class="style-scope ytd-app">

    <template is="dom-if"></template>

   </dom-if>

   <yt-page-navigation-progress class="style-scope ytd-app" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100" aria-valuenow="100" hidden>

    <!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:yt-page-navigation-progress--><!--css_build_styles:video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.styles.yt_base_styles.yt.base.styles.css.js,video.youtube.src.web.polymer.shared.ui.yt_page_navigation_progress.yt.page.navigation.progress.css.js-->

    <div id="progress" class="style-scope yt-page-navigation-progress" style="transform: scaleX(1);"></div>

   </yt-page-navigation-progress>

  </ytd-app>

  <script nonce="">if (window.ytcsi) {window.ytcsi.tick('gcc', null, '');}</script>

  <script nonce="">if (window.ytcsi) {window.ytcsi.tick('nc_pj', null, '');}</script>
